required_security_actions.reason: Questionnaire self-reported data_classification_self_reported = false, but regulated_data_types list includes Inventory position exports and Demand forecast outputs. Policy requires explicit classification of export fields for TIER_3 integrations per ISP-001 §12.2. This discrepancy must be resolved: either the data is unregulated (and the type list should be clarified as metadata only), or the data is regulated and data_classification must be REGULATED. Confirm vendor's understanding of what data fields will be exported and whether they contain ERP-sensitive or restricted information.

ISP-001 §12.2 Tier 3 row requires encryption-in-transit for all export-file transfers. Questionnaire confirms SFTP (which supports encryption), but explicit confirmation of encryption settings is required before contract execution.
